MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon , CSR#6840.

Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eric D. Sentlinger of DEHAY ELLISTON LLP (510-285-0750), appearing for defendant / moving party Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Jerry Verworn

RULING:
DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication of plaintiff's claim for punitive damages is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant the imposition of punitive damages. Plaintiffs' responses to defendant's special interrogatories precludes defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
